cards.front: Name three personal/social digital communication methods.
cards.back: Emailing, instant messaging, blogs, video conferencing, social networking websites/apps.

cards.front: What should users consider when using personal/social communication methods?

cards.back: Video conferencing, teleworking, emailing, promotion methods, apps.

cards.front: What are promotion methods in business communication?
Name three reliability issues with online sources.
How can online information be verified?
cards.back: Check multiple sources and use trustworthy websites.

cards.front: What should learners understand about social networking platforms?
Name one benefit and one drawback area of social media.
cards.back: Learners should understand both benefits and drawbacks of social media.
The concept of ownership of media.

cards.front: What type of communication is teleworking linked to?
